issues.sample: Excessive rain condensation is blocking the front drivers headlights. This is a known issue which BMW refuses to repair under my OEM warranty. This is a known issue with many BMW’s leading to safety issues and electrical issues. The water is pooling in my headlight.

narrative.headline: What 2019 Bmw 7 Series owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 3 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Exterior Lighting (33% of reports).
